docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,170.00 FILED BY COBB,JENNIFER WINTERMEYER,RALF HAMILTON,SCOTT CADIC,CLAYTON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-13-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COBB,JENNIFER WINTERMEYER,RALF HAMILTON,SCOTT CADIC,CLAYTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA $1,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,185.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA HEARING SET FOR JUL-27-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-15-1994 AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-27-1994, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INF'D PLTF TO ALSO MAIL 5TH COPY TO DEF.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-22-1994, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA
IT IS ORDERED THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR DEFT TO PAY PLFT $150/MO BEGIN 10/13/94.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,295.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW,SUSANNA
